title: iso42001_event_log_minimal — ISO/IEC 42001 A.6 Event-Log Integrity Re-Derivation (Axis-2, hash-chain head)
claim_boundary: Proves the disclosed A.6 log-head digest is re-derivable from the declared event log and the log is internally tamper-evident (edit/reorder/insert/delete change the head) under the auditor's pinned chaining rule. NOT a completeness guarantee (no event withheld before commitment), NOT truthfulness of recorded actions, and NOT ISO/IEC 42001 control conformance. Synthetic data; no customer.
